{{CargoRelic
|name=The Book of Raziel
|class_id=22460
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=01-23
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jan 23, 200000 BC, the Archangel Raziel gave this book to Adam.<br>After being expelled from the Garden of Eden for breaking the taboo, Adam received a book from Archangel Raziel containing the crystallization of his wisdom. This book passed through many hands, with famous figures like Noah and King Solomon possessing it and utilizing its knowledge.
|fame=25
|art=31
|fth=47
|civ=24
|tech=27
|ss1=Dragon Minion DEF +1%
|ss2=Dragon Minion DEF +2%
|ss3=Dragon Minion DEF +3%
|ss4=Dragon Minion DEF +5%
|ss7=Dragon Minion DEF +5%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Offeringegg skill I.png|50px]]Place in Offering Egg: Offering Egg hatching efficiency +5%
}}
